Looking at the ASCII, the gray buttons area now shows black (B) instead of the light gray (w) bars. The buttons have been cleared. The G object is at [[1, 55], [1, 61]] which is part of the timer bar - the timer bar now has a dark gray segment at the end.
Now I need to figure out what to do next. The yellow shapes are still in the checkerboard. Let me try clicking on the yellow shapes to see what happens. Looking at the image, there are two yellow objects:
1. Upper one: rows 13-16, cols 30-33 (looks like a small character/person shape)
2. Lower one: rows 33-37, cols 29-34 (looks like a U-shape or gate)
Let me try clicking on the upper yellow shape first.
